articles.title: How to apply to Startup Battlefield 2026, what you need ahead of today’s June 8 deadline
articles.description: Startup Battlefield applications are due tomorrow, so now's the time to put the finishing touches on your submission!

articles.title: NotebookLM’s new update will help you build source repository from chat
articles.description: Google is making Gemini 3.5 the default model in NotebookLM

articles.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
articles.description: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.

articles.title: Sam Bankman-Fried officially asks Trump for a presidential pardon
articles.description: The fallen crypto mogul serving a 25-year sentence filed a clemency petition, betting on Donald Trump's history of crypto pardons even though the president had told him not to count on one.

articles.title: The startup killer: Ledger CTO says the EU's crushing compliance costs are choking Web3 innovation
articles.description: Industry insiders warn that MiCA's steep financial barriers are choking early-stage innovation.

articles.title: WhatsApp says it caught new spyware attacks linked to NSO Group in violation of court order
articles.description: The messaging giant announced that it disrupted a phishing campaign targeting its users with NSO’s spyware.

articles.title: WWDC 2026: What to expect, from Siri’s highly anticipated revamp to Apple Intelligence and iOS 27

articles.title: Aave chief defends protocol's 'resilience' after $8.45 billion bank run
articles.description: The founder of the largest DeFi platform blamed "third-party” entities for decentralized finance’s vulnerabilities, while independent data highlights severe gaps in Aave’s own risk architecture.

articles.title: Bitcoin price $60K support not yet safe as more macro headwinds stack up
articles.description: Bitcoin analysis warned that $60,000 may not hold next, as bear-market moves continued and macro hurdles multiplied.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
articles.description: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.

articles.title: Blame bitcoin's tumble on rising inflation, not Strategy, 10xResearch argues
articles.description: The main driver behind bitcoin's weakness was ETF selling after red-hot April U.S. inflation data, 10x's Markus Thielen argued. The bounce may hinge on Wednesday's CPI data, he said.

articles.title: Bitcoin price eyes $90K as FTX-era BTC bullish divergence flashes again
articles.description: Bitcoin flashes only its second weekly bullish divergence on record, a signal that previously preceded a 755% BTC price rally.

articles.title: South Korea police raid Bithumb over lawmaker hiring favoritism probe: report
articles.description: South Korean lawmaker Kim Byung-gi faces probe over alleged nepotism tied to his son’s crypto jobs as police raid Bithumb's offices.

articles.title: Strategy buys 1,550 Bitcoin after controversial 32 BTC sale
articles.description: Strategy resumed Bitcoin buying by purchasing 1,550 BTC for $101.3 million, bringing its total holdings to 845,256 BTC after last week’s controversial sale.

articles.title: Massachusetts votes to pass new privacy rights bill that bans sale of precise location data
articles.description: The bill is expected to blanket-ban companies and startups from selling people's precise location data across the state.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR gains 12.3% as almost all assets trade higher
articles.description: Bittensor (TAO), up 12% from Friday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

articles.title: MetaMask launches AI agent wallet with built-in security for crypto trades
articles.description: The launch comes as AI agents increasingly emerge as participants in crypto markets, executing trades and managing capital on behalf of users.
